name: Vegetable Stir Fry
ingredients: Rice:200:g, Soy sauce:30:ml, Eggs:1:whole, Garlic:2:cloves, Onion:1:whole, Ginger:1:10g, Salt:1:pinch
instructions: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. Mince garlic and ginger. 3. Heat oil in a wok over high heat. 4. Scramble the egg, then set aside. 5. Stir-fry garlic, ginger, and onion for 2 minutes. 6. Add cooked rice and soy sauce, mix well. 7. Fold in the scrambled egg. 8. Season with salt and serve hot.
